items.scenario: You are a current member of the Linwood Community Arts Center and signed up for a six-week ceramics workshop on Tuesday evenings. The class times unexpectedly shifted by ninety minutes after the first session, which now conflicts with your work schedule.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Donovan, the workshop coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how the new time slot prevents you from attending
Explain why the original Tuesday schedule worked for you
Ask whether returning to the original start time is possible
items.subject: Concerns about the new Tuesday pottery workshop time

items.scenario: You are a junior in Professor Whitaker's introduction to sociolinguistics seminar. The final fieldwork essay is due next Monday, but the senior community interpreter you arranged to interview rescheduled twice and is now only available three days before submission.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Whitaker. In your email, do the following:
goals: Request a five-day extension for the essay
Provide a proposed new submission date with your progress so far
items.subject: Request for an extension on the sociolinguistics field essay

items.scenario: Your friend Naomi and you planned a two-day hike along the Cascade ridge for the third weekend in October. Your new advisor scheduled a mandatory thesis check-in for that exact Saturday, leaving only the following weekend free.
items.direction: Write an email to Naomi. In your email, do the following:
goals: Ask whether the trip can shift to the following weekend
Mention which campsite reservation you would update
items.subject: Moving our Cascade hike to the following weekend

items.scenario: You recently ordered a refurbished burr coffee grinder from a specialty kitchen retailer. The package arrived with a cracked hopper and a missing dosing cup, and the included receipt lists a different model number than what you actually paid for.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Albanese, the customer service supervisor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the condition of the grinder on arrival
Explain the discrepancy on the receipt
Request either a full refund or a verified replacement unit
items.subject: Damaged espresso grinder from order BR-2294
